subject: A small white fluffy creature made of cotton with leaf-like appendages floating in the air
description: A small, round, white creature composed of fluffy cotton-like material floats in the air. Small green leaf-like structures protrude from around its body. Its face has simple, expressive features. The background is a soft pinkish or light warm-toned environment suggesting outdoor foliage or flowering surroundings. The overall image is very soft and airy in palette.
foreground: Small round white cotton-fluff creature with leaf appendages
background: Soft pink-warm outdoor environment with foliage
emotion: gentle and carefree; soft floating posture
